case_title: DENISA ADAIR ET AL VS. IANA ZEMNIAKOVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ADAIR, DENISA KURNODSKIY, YAKOV AS TO DEFENDANT ZEMNIAKOVA, IANA MOSHKOVOI, VLADIMIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $61.00 SERVED SEP-10-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZEMNIAKOVA, IANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAIR, DENISA KURNODSKIY, YAKOV IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZEMNIAKOVA, IANA MOSHKOVOI, VLADIMIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KURNODSKIY, YAKOV
DECLARATION OF DENISA ADAIR RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAIR, DENISA KURNODSKIY, YAKOV
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-04-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-02-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $35.00 SERVED SEP-09-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOSHKOVOI, VLADIMIR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF DENISA ADAIR WHO WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HER SPOUSE--YAKOV KURNODSKIY. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
